summary: 14 film announcements, 11 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: 13 Going On 30 Reboot
film.announcement: Jessica Alba joins Netflix's reboot of the film, taking on a lead role in the reimagining.

film.title: G.I. Joe
film.announcement: Danny McBride is set to direct a new G.I. Joe film for Paramount.

film.title: They Follow
film.talent: Jackie Earle Haley, Justine Lupe, Michael Gandolfini, Melora Walters
film.announcement: Neon adds Jackie Earle Haley, Justine Lupe, Michael Gandolfini, Melora Walters and six additional actors to the cast.

film.title: Mini War
film.talent: Luke Wilson, Vanessa Hudgens, Nick Swardson
film.announcement: Luke Wilson, Vanessa Hudgens, and Nick Swardson star in feature comedy 'Mini War' from the creators of 'Grandma's Boy'.

film.title: Jason Statham Stole My Bike
film.talent: Hannah Waddingham, Jason Statham; David Leitch (director)
film.announcement: Hannah Waddingham is cast opposite Jason Statham in David Leitch's action-comedy.

film.title: Steps
film.talent: Daniel Radcliffe, Young Mazino, Peter Dinklage
film.announcement: Daniel Radcliffe, Young Mazino, and Peter Dinklage join the cast of Netflix's animated 'Cinderella' reimagining.

film.title: Shadows In Sunlight
film.announcement: Documentary+ acquires the documentary film about a polio vaccination campaign beset by violence.

film.title: The Batman Part II
film.announcement: Warner Bros. delays the release of 'The Batman Part II' again, now moving to 2028.

film.title: All of a Sudden
film.announcement: Ryusuke Hamaguchi's acclaimed drama locks down its awards season release date.

film.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks
film.announcement: A new 'Alvin and the Chipmunks' movie is in development with a planned 2028 release.

film.title: The Great Beyond
film.announcement: J.J. Abrams' 'The Great Beyond' starring Glen Powell is delayed one year in Warner Bros. slate shakeup.

film.title: Don't Move
film.announcement: James Murray from 'Impractical Jokers' stars in the giant spider horror movie 'Don't Move' which debuts its trailer.

film.title: Hope
film.announcement: Neon brings Na Hong-Jin's 'Hope' to Comic-Con for a panel presentation.

tv.title: The Rookie
tv.announcement: ABC's 'The Rookie' releases an extended cut of episode 810 on Hulu in a rare move for the series.

tv.title: Dexter: Resurrection
tv.announcement: Gabriel Luna joins the cast of 'Dexter: Resurrection' Season 2 as a serial killer guest star.

tv.title: Chicks
tv.talent: Jodie Whittaker, Ellen Pompeo; Katie Robbins (creator)
tv.announcement: Jodie Whittaker joins Ellen Pompeo in the Hulu dramedy pilot 'Chicks' from creator Katie Robbins.

tv.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
tv.announcement: FX sets Season 18 of 'It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia' for release with expanded episode count.

tv.title: Cold as Balls
tv.announcement: Kevin Hart's ice-bath interview show 'Cold as Balls' debuts new episodes on Netflix.

tv.title: Army of Shadows
tv.talent: America Ferrera, Paddy Considine, Kit Harington
tv.announcement: America Ferrera, Paddy Considine, and Kit Harington lead the cast of Channel 4 thriller 'Army of Shadows'.

tv.title: Death in Llanes
tv.announcement: SkyShowtime sets Spanish original series 'Death in Llanes' about the murder of a politician.

tv.title: HGTV 90s Home Renovation Series
tv.announcement: HGTV sets new '90s home renovation series with Jaleel White as host.

tv.title: My Life With the Walter Boys
tv.announcement: Netflix releases Season 3 trailer for 'My Life With the Walter Boys' teasing fallout from a major love confession.

tv.title: The Challenge
tv.announcement: 'The Challenge' moves to Paramount+ for Season 42, formerly known as 'Cutthroat'.
